message:
fix(membrane): add validation reentry guard to prevent recursive membrane deadlock

Add VALIDATION_DEPTH thread-local counter and ValidationExecutionGuard
RAII type in ptr_validator to track when code is executing inside a
validation pipeline call. Wire in_validation_context() check into the
string_abi membrane guard so that string operations (memcpy, memmove,
strlen, strstr, etc.) triggered from within the validation pipeline
itself bypass the membrane rather than deadlocking on reentrant
pipeline access.

This closes the last known reentry vector: validation → string op →
membrane → validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
